summary: Tested mobile bug fixes for AddCarModal tab bar and page refresh. All critical tests PASSED: tabs display correctly on mobile without overlap, all 4 tabs clickable, and page refresh shows content (no black screen).

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) on initial render - cosmetic only, not a bug

Mobile (390x844): flex-1 for equal tab distribution on mobile - VERIFIED

Service Worker: network-first for navigation requests (sw.js lines 64-70) - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: AddCarModal.jsx line 321: Tab container has 'overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hide' - correctly hides scrollbar on mobile
AddCarModal.jsx line 328: Tab buttons use 'flex-1 sm:flex-initial' - correctly distributes tabs equally on mobile
index.css lines 101-107: scrollbar-hide utility class properly defined with -webkit-scrollbar:display:none and scrollbar-width:none
sw.js lines 64-70: Navigation requests use network-first strategy (fetch then cache fallback) - fixes black screen on refresh
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile UI bugs fixed: 1) AddCarModal tab bar no longer shows horizontal scrollbar (scrollbar-hide utility added), 2) tabs display correctly on mobile with equal width distribution (flex-1 on mobile), 3) page refresh no longer shows black screen (Service Worker uses network-first for navigation). Test by opening sidebar via hamburger menu (coordinates ~35,35), clicking quick-add-car button, verifying 4 tabs visible without scrollbar.

mocked_apis.Email verification: MOCKED - verification code displayed on screen
